behavior_summary: This script implements a 'U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch'/eruption sequence for pyro-related items: when triggered it scans for matching items and for each match spawns a per-item worker that runs an animated eruption producing sounds, sprites, area damage and optionally spawns NPCs or fire-spell effects.

Work is performed asynchronously: the entry point (ENDPYRO::hatch) enumerates targets and spawns helper workers (ENDPYRO::00F7) rather than performing the long sequence inline. Those workers in turn spawn smaller helper routines (ENDPYRO::00BC, ENDPYRO::0548 and multiple external FREE/PYROS/METHOD tasks) to orchestrate timed effects, sound, visuals and cleanup.
Randomness (urandom) and per-item frame/status checks are used to vary visual/sound outcomes and whether an item is converted into NPCs or simply animated and destroyed/populated with effects.
A global guard (pyrosQuitPlayingAround) is read early to allow the engine or scripts to suppress further pyro activity if set.
notable_control_flow: Event-driven entry: U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch runs on a U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch trigger and enumerates candidate items using loop/set-info/process-exclude semantics, spawning one worker per match.

Asynchronous chaining: U8P_ENDPYRO::00F7 spawns U8P_ENDPYRO::0548 (detailed processor) plus several PYROS/METHOD/FREE helpers and suspends between stages to let those sub-tasks run in parallel/timed order.
Guarded loops: worker routines regularly check the global pyrosQuitPlayingAround flag and will exit early if it is set, stopping further effects.
Conditional branching based on item state/frame/quantity: U8P_ENDPYRO::0548 examines Item::getFrame/Item::getQ and chooses between creating NPCs/fire spells or animating/destroying the item.
open_questions: Exact parameter names and types for the script entry (confirmed as pid and an item pointer by inference but not explicit).
Precise meanings of some item info/status bits toggled via Item::andStatus/Item::orStatus (which specific flags are set/cleared).
Full behavior and parameters of many spawned PYROS/METHOD/FREE extern helpers (they are referenced but their internal semantics are not fully recovered here).
Whether any of the spawned NPCs are intended as allies or hostile — Npc::create and stat-setting are present but allegiance/context requires game data not in the disassembly.

main_function.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch
main_function.purpose: Entry handler for a pyro/egg 'U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch' event. Scan for relevant items/instances and spawn dedicated per-item worker processes to run the eruption/animation/effects sequence.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the 'U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch' event (inferred event 7/area-trigger semantics).
Activated when there are one or more matching pyro items nearby or targeted by the initial item/context the event was invoked with.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch
function_map.role: Event entry: enumerate matching items and spawn per-item worker processes to perform the eruption sequence.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::00F7
function_map.role: Per-item worker: orchestrates the high-level eruption steps (stasis, music/SFX, status flips, spawn other PYROS/METHOD/FREE helpers, create sprites, call U8P_ENDPYRO::0548 for detailed processing).

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::00BC
function_map.role: Timed/cleanup helper that repeatedly spawns FREE helpers and suspends, used for scheduling or brief repeated effects.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPYRO::0548
function_map.role: Detailed per-item processor: inspects item frame/quantity/status, possibly creates NPCs (Npc::create) and fire spells, animates frames, spawns sprites and applies Item::receiveHit/destroy/pop logic.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a per-item worker for each matched item so the detailed eruption work runs asynchronously.
Delegate detailed per-item conversion/animation/damage lifecycle to a specialized routine while 00F7 coordinates other effects and timing.
Spawn a short timer/cleanup helper to schedule repeated frees or minor effects during the eruption sequence.

external_calls.purpose: Read the current animation/frame index of the item to determine branch and animation start state.
Temporarily put the avatar/player into stasis to prevent actions during key parts of the eruption sequence (player freeze effect).
Play a short music cue at the start of the U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch/eruption.
Play explosion/eruption sound effects, often varied via randomness.
Spawn other PYROS scripts to create visual/dialogue/auxiliary effects associated with the eruption.
Spawn small helper/timer/cleanup tasks to schedule future actions and free resources asynchronously.
Create NPCs and initialize their stats when an item converts into active enemies as part of the eruption.
Spawn a fire spell/effect tied to the eruption to cause continued flame/damage behavior.
Apply area damage/effects at computed positions during the eruption (explosion damage).
Animate and ultimately remove or update the initiating item as part of the eruption lifecycle.
Create temporary visual sprites (explosion debris, flames) at positions computed from item coordinates and urandom offsets.
Generate random values to vary sprite positions, timings and branching decisions for non-deterministic effects.
Spawn object-method helpers for repeated updates to NPCs or items (movement, animation, state changes).

reads.name: pyrosQuitPlayingAround
reads.likely_effect: Global stop/suppression guard: when set the script's per-item loops and effect spawn sequences early-exit to stop further pyro activity.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a 'U8P_ENDPYRO::hatch'/eruption sequence for pyro-related items: when triggered it scans for matching items and for each match spawns a per-item worker that runs an animated eruption producing sounds, sprites, area damage and optionally spawns NPCs or fire-spell effects.
